news.title: India's oil contingency plan in pipeline amid Iran disruptions: Export curbs, more Russian crude, LPG rationing on table
news.india_relevance: Directly addresses India's emergency policy response to energy security threats in its primary supply region.
news.why_it_matters: The government is preparing for worst-case scenarios including rationing and trade curbs to manage fiscal and energy shocks.

news.title: India most vulnerable to prolonged disruptions to West Asian oil: Analysts
news.india_relevance: Explains why India's high import dependency makes it the primary victim of regional supply chain shocks.
news.why_it_matters: A prolonged conflict could derail India's inflation targets and current account stability more than any other major economy.

news.title: Gridlock On The Green Path: Transmission Delays Trigger Massive Power Waste
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the structural bottleneck in India's renewable energy transition involving the national grid.
news.why_it_matters: Despite massive solar/wind capacity additions, the lack of transmission infrastructure is leading to significant energy losses.

news.title: Iran-US war: India's marine insurance sector faces strain, war-risk premiums shoot up
news.india_relevance: Impacts the cost of doing business for every Indian company involved in international trade through the Persian Gulf.
news.why_it_matters: Rising insurance costs act as a hidden tax on trade, potentially making Indian exports less competitive globally.

news.title: Watch Why Big AI Is Obsessed With India - Bloomberg.com
news.india_relevance: Explores the structural shift of global AI giants viewing India as a critical data and talent laboratory.
news.why_it_matters: India is transitioning from a back-office hub to a primary training ground for global AI models and infrastructure.

news.title: Telecom industry to need additional ARPU of ₹35-40 to get 15% ROCE: Ind-Ra
news.india_relevance: Provides a financial mechanism analysis of the viability of India's telecom sector post-5G investments.
news.why_it_matters: Indicates that another round of tariff hikes is inevitable for telcos to sustain their capital-heavy business models.

news.title: Reliance Retail recalibrates fashion play to tap Gen Z demand
news.india_relevance: Highlights a major business model shift by India's largest retailer to capture the youth demographic.
news.why_it_matters: Signals a move away from traditional retail formats toward fast-fashion and digital-first consumption patterns.

news.title: No cultural taboo: The rich go for gold loan as metal soars
news.india_relevance: Documents a significant social-economy trend in how Indian households are leveraging assets during price spikes.
news.why_it_matters: The shift in gold loan demographics suggests a change in credit behavior and liquidity management among affluent Indians.

news.title: India, Canada sign $2.6 billion uranium deal, target $50 billion trade by 2030 with CEPA push
news.india_relevance: A major policy and supply-chain breakthrough for India's nuclear energy and long-term trade relations.
news.why_it_matters: Secures critical fuel for India's clean energy goals while signaling a thaw in diplomatic and trade relations with Canada.

news.title: Private sector may commit a record  ₹1 trillion to highways construction in FY27
news.india_relevance: Reflects a structural shift in how India's infrastructure is being funded, moving toward private capital.
news.why_it_matters: Reduced reliance on the central budget for highway expansion could free up fiscal space for social spending.

news.title: Datanomics: How the West Asia conflict risks inflating India's oil bill
news.india_relevance: A data-driven explanation of the second-order effects of regional conflict on India's macro-stability.
news.why_it_matters: Breaks down the specific cost-push factors that could lead to a wider trade deficit and rupee depreciation.

news.title: On a War-footing: Reinsurers move to rework marine, aviation policies as West Asia tensions rise
news.india_relevance: Critical for Indian airlines and shipping lines navigating the West Asian corridor.
news.why_it_matters: Global reinsurers pulling back or raising rates creates a liquidity and risk management crisis for Indian transport giants.

news.title: Budget smartphones under Rs 10,000 may disappear amid rising memory costs
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts the digital inclusion and consumption patterns of hundreds of millions of Indian consumers.
news.why_it_matters: Rising component costs are killing the 'entry-level' segment, potentially slowing down India's smartphone penetration.

news.title: Decoding Nykaa’s profit-first beauty play - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the business model evolution of one of India's most prominent consumer-tech startups.
news.why_it_matters: Reflects the broader shift in the Indian startup ecosystem from 'growth at all costs' to sustainable profitability.

news.title: AI-based spam data must be shared in hours, Trai to telcos
news.india_relevance: A significant regulatory move affecting India's massive mobile user base and telecom operations.
news.why_it_matters: TRAI is forcing a technological upgrade in how telcos manage consumer protection and data sharing.

news.title: State-run banks rolling out GCC, AI road map under EASE 9.0 reforms
news.india_relevance: Details the structural modernization of India's public sector banks through technology adoption.
news.why_it_matters: PSBs are attempting to close the tech gap with private rivals to improve efficiency and risk management.

news.title: Japan, South Korea raise concerns about India’s steel import restrictions
news.india_relevance: Highlights the friction between India's 'Make in India' protectionism and its global trade commitments.
news.why_it_matters: Trade tensions with key Asian partners could impact reciprocal market access for Indian goods.

news.title: US-Iran war leaves 70,000 tonne of Indian Basmati to Gulf stuck on high seas
news.india_relevance: A specific supply-chain story illustrating the immediate impact of the conflict on Indian agricultural exports.
news.why_it_matters: The Gulf is the largest market for Indian Basmati; prolonged blockage threatens the livelihoods of farmers and exporters.

news.title: No insurance companies to get marine hull war risk reinsurance support from GIC Re for certain high-risk zones
news.india_relevance: A major shift in the risk-bearing capacity of India's state-owned reinsurer.
news.why_it_matters: GIC Re's withdrawal forces Indian shippers to seek expensive international alternatives or operate without cover.

news.title: Electric 4-wheeler registrations grow 50% YoY in February led by Tata
news.india_relevance: Tracks the structural transition of the Indian automotive market toward electrification.
news.why_it_matters: Despite global cooling in EV demand, the Indian market continues to show strong momentum in the passenger vehicle segment.

news.title: How Iran war could impact Indian banking sector amid oil price shock
news.india_relevance: Explains the mechanism by which geopolitical conflict transmits to the balance sheets of Indian lenders.
news.why_it_matters: Higher oil prices lead to imported inflation, potentially forcing the RBI to keep interest rates high for longer.

news.title: Iranian strikes test the Gulf’s trillion-dollar AI dream
news.india_relevance: Relevant due to the deep integration of Indian tech talent and capital with the Gulf's sovereign wealth funds.
news.why_it_matters: If the Gulf's tech ambitions are derailed by war, it could impact the flow of investment into the Indian startup ecosystem.

news.title: 100% FDI gives flexibility to serious insurers: Generali Central Insurance
news.india_relevance: Discusses the impact of liberalized investment policies on the competitiveness of India's insurance sector.
news.why_it_matters: Increased foreign ownership is expected to bring better technology and product innovation to the Indian market.

news.title: Tata Motors, M&M, and JSW MG oppose Niti Aayog's transport report

news.why_it_matters: The disagreement over the future of transport policy could delay critical regulatory frameworks for the auto industry.

news.title: India unlikely to see petrol, diesel price hike despite global oil prices spiking to $80
news.india_relevance: Explains the political-economy mechanism of fuel pricing in India during global crises.

This mechanism forces a choice between higher food prices or a wider fiscal deficit.

telegram.title: Goldman says European gas could jump 130% on Hormuz disruption

reports.title: GDP: New series shows manufacturing has done far better

reports.why_it_matters:

reports.title: Muted Deposit Growth Lifts CD Ratio to Record High

reports.why_it_matters:

This has direct implications for corporate credit availability and bank margins.

reports.title: Asia’s outlook under higher oil prices

reports.why_it_matters:
Connects geopolitical tensions to the domestic cost of living and the RBI's potential interest rate trajectory.
Essential for understanding the external headwinds facing the Indian Rupee.

reports.title: C&I renewable capacity to surge ~40% in the two fiscals through 2028
reports.india_relevance: Tracks the transition of Indian Commercial and Industrial (C&I) players toward captive green energy sources.
reports.why_it_matters:

Driven by both ESG mandates and the long-term cost-competitiveness of solar and wind over grid power.

reports.title: Analysis of State Finances
reports.india_relevance: Provides a deep dive into the fiscal health of Indian states, which control a significant portion of public infrastructure spending.
reports.why_it_matters:
State-level debt and revenue receipts often dictate the quality of local infrastructure and social welfare schemes.
Crucial for understanding the second-order effects of central government fiscal transfers.

This is a high-signal explanatory piece on macro-stability.

youtube.title: The $1 Billion DHARAVI Slum Gamble: Is Adani Building the Dream City or Killing an Economy?
youtube.india_relevance: Dharavi is a critical hub for India's informal manufacturing sector, now undergoing a massive redevelopment by the Adani Group.

youtube.india_relevance: Job creation is the single most important policy and economic challenge for India's demographic dividend.
youtube.why_it_matters:

twitter.title: Elina Ghosh, 65, lives alone in Delhi with Parkinson's. Her aunt in Jabalpur, paralysed after a stroke, can't find trained caregivers. Read on: #Eldercare  #Population https://www.indiaspend.com/health/why-india-needs-to-improve-elderly-care-access-981112
twitter.india_relevance: Examines the structural gaps in India's elderly care sector, a major social-economy trend.
twitter.why_it_matters: Highlights a critical, under-reported labour and service delivery challenge linked to India's demographic transition, with implications for healthcare, employment, and policy.

twitter.title: Side comment post-Qatar LNG shutdown: Asian countries got a huge reminder today of the advantages of coal for baseload electricity. Maybe also about the advantages of renewables. But a lot more about coal. Today's event will have important policy implications.
twitter.india_relevance: Insightful analysis directly impacting India's energy security and fuel-mix policy debates.
twitter.why_it_matters: Connects a global commodity shock (LNG) to a core structural choice for India's power sector, framing a long-term debate on coal vs renewables vs gas in light of geopolitical risk.
